ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel where the order was placed (e.g., online, physical store, marketplace) */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chosen shipping method */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the customer */,
  "admin_notes" TEXT /* Notes from admin users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item entry */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item entry was last updated */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being ordered */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "communication_preferences" TEXT /* Customer communication preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity available */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity for automatic reordering */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item image */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last time the stock was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping method */,
  "minimum_order_value" REAL /* Minimum order value for the shipping method */,
  "maximum_order_value" REAL /* Maximum order value for the shipping method */,
  "available_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the shipping method is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to this payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item for which the inventory is logged */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of change in inventory (positive or negative) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is a final status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
